title: mentha × schultziana var. brutteletii
intro: Mentha × schultziana var. brutteletii, also known as Bruk's mint, is a variety of hybrid mint plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and digestive aid. The health benefits of Bruk's mint include its ability to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, nausea, and headaches, as well as its potential to reduce stress and promote relaxation. Bruk's mint can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or added to skincare products, making it a versatile and useful addition to natural medicine and wellness practices.
